full_text:
Wu Dun (Annu) 吳敦 (黯奴)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Dun (吳敦), styledAnnu (黯奴), was born in Donghai. Bandit leader who would serve under Zang Ba for Lü Bu and Wei. Wu Dun was affiliated with Lu Bu and the Wei Kingdom.
